current.summary: Phase D Add Wizard: full bead-chain setup complete — spec, expert panel, plan, parity, sanity all passed. Ready for implementation.

activeWork.description: Phase D Add Wizard — 5-step full-screen wizard for importing content into the library from providers, registries, local paths, or git URLs
activeWork.progress: All gates passed: spec v2 (expert panel: 4 agents, ~30 MUST-FIX addressed), plan v3 (parity: 5 GAPs fixed, sanity: 3 BLOCKs fixed). 21 beads created with full dependency chain. First 4 beads closed (spec, plan, parity, sanity). Next bead ready: Task 1 Checkbox List Component (syllago-iifdz).

recentDecisions: Bead-chain approach for Phase D (full gated workflow like Phase C: spec → expert panel → plan → parity → sanity → sequential impl/validate pairs)
Skip code scanning research spike — use existing risk.go as-is for all content types

Expert panel found key issues: git URL ext:: protocol attack, taint propagation gaps, reviewAcknowledged never assigned, Enter ambiguity on Discovery step (Enter=drill-in only, →=advance), two-level Esc on Source step

Sanity check found 3 BLOCKs: config.PathResolver not config.Config for discovery, Outdated items need Force=true auto-set, toast mechanism via App-level message handling not invented toastPushMsg type
Always clear downstream state on source change (simple > fragile prevSource tracking)
nextSteps: Commit spec + plan + beads changes (21 uncommitted files)
Start syllago-iifdz: Task 1 Checkbox List Component (checkbox_list.go + checkbox_list_test.go)
After Task 1 validate, proceed to Task 2: Add Wizard Model + Source Step (the big wiring task)
Continue sequential impl→validate chain through all 8 tasks + phase validation

context.notes: Phase D has 17 remaining beads (8 impl + 8 validate + 1 phase validation). Task 8 (Git URL Source) is marked as stretch but should be done for completeness. The spec and plan have been through 3 review gates (expert panel, parity, sanity) — they are thorough. Key files: spec at docs/plans/2026-03-27-phase-d-add-wizard-spec.md, plan at docs/plans/2026-03-27-phase-d-implementation-plan.md. The plan references existing install wizard patterns extensively — read install.go, install_update.go, install_view.go for the template to follow. The provider-monitor uncommitted files from the previous session are still present (20 files) but are separate work — don't mix them with Phase D commits.
